ast.target: 存储配额已超出。同步已暂停。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password cannot start or end with spaces.
ast.target: 密码不能以空格开头或结尾。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password must be at least 12 characters.
ast.target: 密码必须至少为 12 个字符。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password must be 256 characters or fewer.
ast.target: 密码必须为 256 个字符或更少。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password is too easy to guess. Use a longer passphrase.
ast.target: 密码太容易被猜到。请使用更长的密码短语。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password cannot be one repeated character.
ast.target: 密码不能是重复的单个字符。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password cannot be a simple sequence.
ast.target: 密码不能是简单的序列。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Password is required.
ast.target: 密码为必填项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Connect and sign in before viewing version history.
ast.target: 请先连接并登录，然后再查看版本历史。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Open a synced file to view its history.
ast.target: 打开一个已同步的文件以查看其历史记录。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This file is excluded from Synch.
ast.target: 此文件已从 Synch 中排除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This file has not synced yet.
ast.target: 此文件尚未同步。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Sync local changes before restoring this deleted file.
ast.target: 请在恢复此已删除文件之前同步本地更改。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No restorable version exists for this deleted file.
ast.target: 此已删除文件不存在可恢复的版本。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This version is not a UTF-8 text file.
ast.target: 此版本不是 UTF-8 文本文件。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This Synch server is not compatible with this plugin version. Update the server or install a compatible Synch plugin version.
ast.target: 此 Synch 服务器与此插件版本不兼容。请更新服务器或安装兼容的 Synch 插件版本。
